lemon_market_new_listings.description: This car is in good condition and has been well-maintained.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and visible damage to both the exterior and interior that will require extensive repairs.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, meticulously maintained and showing virtually no signs of wear. The exterior paint retains its original showroom shine, and the interior is pristine with all components functioning perfectly. Mechanically, it is flawless, offering a smooth and powerful driving experience that feels brand new. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a car in peak collector-grade condition.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous care. Every surface and mechanical component adheres to our most stringent quality benchmarks, offering an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning enthusiast. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished caliber.

Hey everyone! 🌟 I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly pristine condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this thing since day one, keeping it garage-kept and meticulously detailed. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership headache, this is the one for you. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. Come take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed! ✨

Offered is an exceptional 997.2-generation Porsche 911 Carrera S, maintained to an exacting mechanical standard. This specimen features the 3.8L naturally aspirated flat-six with Direct Fuel Injection (DFI), paired with a 7-speed PDK dual-clutch transaxle for seamless torque delivery. The chassis is optimized with Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) and a factory limited-slip differential, providing surgical precision during high-lateral-G maneuvers. A recent DME report confirms zero over-revs in all ranges, and the engine exhibits no signs of thermal cycling fatigue or fluid seepage. Pristine bores, factory-spec compression, and a documented service history highlight its mechanical integrity. This is a true turn-key enthusiast's car, devoid of the typical wear found on high-performance builds.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Full service history included.

Presenting a true collector-grade masterpiece that defies its age, this vehicle is in absolute showroom condition. The exterior retains its original factory finish with a deep, mirror-like luster, entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. Every body panel is perfectly aligned, and the trim remains supple and dark, having been preserved in a climate-controlled environment since day one. Inside, the cabin is a pristine sanctuary; the premium leather seats show zero bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and the dashboard is free of any UV fading or cracks. Every electronic component, from the tactile switches to the high-resolution displays, operates with factory precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been maintained with an open-checkbook policy, evidenced by a comprehensive service binder. The engine bay is detailed to show-quality standards, and the car drives with the tightness and responsiveness of a brand-new vehicle. This sale includes all original keys, the complete owner's manual set, and the original window sticker. For the discerning buyer seeking the finest example in existence, this is an unparalleled opportunity.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive engineering, preserved in immaculate, showroom-grade condition. This vehicle has been maintained to the most exacting standards, exhibiting no discernible wear and offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. Every aspect, from the flawless interior surfaces to the pristine mechanical assembly, reflects a legacy of meticulous care and climate-controlled storage. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of unrivaled caliber and aesthetic perfection.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s a bit bittersweet to see it go. This car is in truly mint condition—I’ve pampered it since day one, and it still has that 'fresh off the lot' feel! It’s been garage-kept, meticulously detailed, and drives like an absolute dream. No scratches, no spills, just pure perfection. If you're looking for a ride that’s basically brand new but without the brand-new price tag, you’ve found it! I'd love for it to go to someone who will appreciate it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Available is a museum-grade E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54B32 3.2L inline-six, renowned for its 8,000 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies. This specimen boasts a flawless Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torque distribution. The high-pressure Double-VANOS system has been meticulously maintained, providing crisp valve timing across the entire powerband. Critically, the rear subframe has been professionally reinforced to exceed factory specifications, preserving the structural rigidity of the chassis. Finished in Carbon Black with a pristine Nappa leather interior, the vehicle retains its original suspension kinematics and displays zero oxidative wear on the undercarriage. A definitive collector-grade icon for the technical purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No cosmetic or mechanical defects. Full service history included.
